name.full: RiskRadar — AI Tool Risk Assessment for Schools

description.short: Assess AI tools before deploying them to students
description.full: RiskRadar helps school IT administrators, network managers, and Data Protection Officers assess AI tools against the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, ICO Children's Code, and EU AI Act. It conducts a structured 5-dimension assessment, generates a risk rating, and saves results to your school's Approved Tools Registry.
